name: PDF Processor
description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text, tables, and form fields; creating new PDFs; merging, splitting, and annotating documents. This is one of Anthropic's production document skills that underlies Claude's native PDF capabilities on claude.ai.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Source-available (not open source) — production document skill powering Claude's PDF file capabilities. Verified at skills/pdf/ in the repo tree.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
